0.name: Prof. Candice
0.text: Well, well, well... If it isn't Mr. Colin.

2.name: Prof. Candice
2.text: You were aware that we we're gonna have a quiz today, right?

3.name: Colin
3.text: Most certainly! ( most certainly forgot about it! )

4.name: Prof. Candice
4.text: It doesn't seem to bother you that you could've missed the test entirely.

5.name: Colin
5.text: Well now it does bother me a litte.

6.name: Prof. Candice
6.text: Go on and take a seat then. We'll start right as soon as you get settled.
